users.description: Store user profiles, game levels, and high scores.

username.description: The unique name chosen by the user.

ddcScore.description: High score for Dewey Decimal Classification game.

catalogingScore.description: High score for Cataloging Details game.

filingScore.description: High score for Alphabetical Filing game.

subjectScore.description: High score for Subject Classification game.

gkScore.description: High score for General Knowledge Quiz game.

lastActive.description: Last time the user played any game.

custom_questions.description: Store admin-created or AI-generated custom questions that are merged into the game pools.

gameType.description: One of ddc, cataloging, filing, subject, gk.

questionData.description: Stringified JSON of the question record matching its game structure.

createdAt.description: When the custom question was added.
